title: Representation Theory Higher: Kac-Moody Algebras & Moonshine

key_theorem.theorem: EML-3 Universality of Modular Representation Theory
key_theorem.statement: Characters of affine Lie algebra representations are modular forms: EML-3. The Monster group |M| is EML-0 (integer). McKay-Thompson series T_g(τ) are EML-3 (Hauptmoduln = modular functions). Hardy-Ramanujan p(n) ~ exp(π√(2n/3)) is EML-1 (single exp asymptotic). Indefinite Kac-Moody (E₁₀, E₁₁) characters are EML-∞: no Weyl-type closed form exists. Moonshine is the phenomenon where EML-0 integers (Monster rep dims) appear as Fourier coefficients of EML-3 modular functions.

algebras.name: sl₂ = A₁
algebras.reason: Character = ratio of EML-3 theta-like functions = EML-3

algebras.name: ŝl₂ (affine A₁)
algebras.reason: Modular form: Θ_{λ,k}(τ) = Σ_{n}q^{(λ+2kn)²/4k} = EML-3; η(τ) = q^{1/24}∏(1-qⁿ) = EML-3

algebras.name: E₈ (finite)
algebras.character_formula: Weyl character formula: ratio of alternating sums
algebras.reason: E₈ character via Weyl formula = EML-3 (products of q-exponentials)

algebras.name: Ê₈ (affine E₈)
algebras.character_formula: χ = j(τ)^{1/3}: cube root of j-function
algebras.reason: j(τ)^{1/3} is still a modular function = EML-3

algebras.name: E₁₀ (hyperbolic)
algebras.reason: Hyperbolic Kac-Moody: no Weyl-type character formula → EML-∞

dedekind_eta.eml_reason: q = exp(2πiτ): EML-3; infinite product of EML-3 terms = EML-3

j_function_coefficients.note: constant 744 (choice of normalization: j-744 = McKay-Thompson T_e)

McKay_observation.196883: Dimension of smallest non-trivial Monster irrep
McKay_observation.significance: j(τ) 'knows about' the Monster group — moonshine connection
McKay_observation.moonshine: EML-0 integers (Monster rep dims) appear as coefficients of EML-3 modular function

generalized_moonshine.Mathieu_moonshine: M₂₄ ↔ K3 surface Hodge numbers: EML-3 (elliptic genus)
generalized_moonshine.Umbral_moonshine: 23 cases of moonshine for Niemeier lattice automorphisms: EML-3

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Monster group order |M|; Monster irrep dimensions; linking numbers in moonshine
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Hardy-Ramanujan p(n) ~ exp(π√(2n/3)); character growth bounds
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Root system geometry; Cartan matrix; Weyl denominator
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Affine characters (theta/eta ratio); j(τ); McKay-Thompson T_g; Dedekind η
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Indefinite Kac-Moody characters (E₁₀, E₁₁); no modular formula

connections.to_session_58: Session 58: Chern numbers = EML-0. Session 87: Monster order = EML-0 — topological integer
connections.to_session_73: Session 73: hypergeometric functions = EML-3. Session 87: modular forms = EML-3 — same depth class
